title: AiMlPlatformNats
description: NATS subjects for the AI/ML telemetry + MDP/POMDP optimizer + DES simulator stack. Mirrors remote/argocd/ai-ml-platform/dd-ai-ml-data-contracts.configmap.yaml.

$dd:nats.summary: Telemetry ingress, ML feature publication, MDP optimization, and DES simulation subjects.

subjects.name: TelemetryRaw
subjects.description: Raw runtime telemetry samples ingested by the ai-ml-pipeline. Default for ML_RAW_TELEMETRY_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.telemetry.raw

subjects.name: MlFeatures
subjects.description: Derived ML features (z-scores, EWMA baselines) published by ai-ml-pipeline. Default for ML_FEATURE_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.ml.features

subjects.name: TelemetryMdp
subjects.description: MDP telemetry requests emitted by ai-ml-pipeline and consumed by the MDP optimizer. Default for ML_MDP_TELEMETRY_SUBJECT / MDP_TELEMETRY_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.telemetry.mdp

subjects.name: MlDeadLetter
subjects.description: Dead-letter target for ai-ml-pipeline messages that failed validation/processing. Default for ML_DEAD_LETTER_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.ml.deadletter

subjects.name: MdpOptimize
subjects.description: MDP/POMDP optimization job requests. Default for MDP_OPTIMIZE_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.mdp.optimize

subjects.name: MdpResults
subjects.description: MDP optimization results published by the optimizer. Default for MDP_RESULT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.mdp.results

subjects.name: DesSimulate
subjects.description: Discrete-event simulation job requests. Default for DES_SIMULATE_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.des.simulate

subjects.name: DesResults
subjects.description: Discrete-event simulation results. Default for DES_RESULT_SUBJECT.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.des.results
